Geo Matching Engine

Pincode Nearby 3 KM Global ZIP Ready

Nearby Legal Discovery Logic

This engine helps route legal demand to nearby advocates, junior lawyers, law firms and notary desks using pincode-first discovery, service radius and future global zip-code support.

Pincode Match 3 KM Radius 5 KM Fallback Zip Code Ready Nearby Advocate Nearby Notary

Geo Search Input

Matching Rules

  • First priority: same pincode / zip code
  • Second priority: within 3 KM radius
  • Third priority: city-wide matching
  • Fallback: online consultation match
  • Premium cases can override distance for specialization
